especially, and...

And templatize things so that they have to spend less time working on the feedback loop so that you can start to automate some of those processes and make the underlying workflows less time-intensive for individuals.
What would an incentive look like in your mind?
I mean, there are lots of ways to do that.
You could do something like a competition for who puts in the most feedback.

You could really think about how, especially because you guys are growing so much, how that feedback loop can lead to career growth or a cash incentive just for like every time you give like a good piece of feedback that leads to a product change.
